creator: aldous@penaranda.name
text:
The first sentence on http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/conflicts.html reads:

    There are tree different variables to register a conflict between packages and ports: CONFLICTS, CONFLICTS_INSTALL and CONFLICTS_BUILD.

It should instead be:

    There are three different variables to register a conflict between packages and ports: CONFLICTS, CONFLICTS_INSTALL and CONFLICTS_BUILD.
